brand.name: NEXS
brand.hero: Engineered to Be Invisible. Better Than Day One.
brand.thaiHero: ยิ่งมองไม่เห็นฟิล์ม ยิ่งเห็นความสมบูรณ์แบบ
brand.quote: A Higher Standard for Invisible Surfaces.

typography.english: Inter or system sans; SF Pro as visual reference only
typography.thai: Noto Sans Thai or IBM Plex Sans Thai

rules: No public pricing anywhere on web or in visual assets.
White/soft grey Apple-inspired canvas is the default; avoid full black homepage.
Use black panels only for quote blocks, carbon detail, or high-contrast product moments.
Accent red must be restrained: CTA, active states, micro lines, and selected highlights only.
